stemHtml: On a Commercial Air Transport flight, when carrying Special Categories of Passengers (SCPs), such as Persons with Reduced Mobility (PRMs), they..

options.a: should not be allocated, nor occupy, seats that permit direct access to emergency exits.
options.b: should not be allocated, nor occupy, seats that permit direct access to emergency exits, unless accompanied by an Able-Bodied Passenger (ABP).
options.c: should be allocated seats next to emergency exits, to facilitate their evacuation from the aircraft.
options.d: may be allocated seats next to emergency exits, to facilitate their evacuation from the aircraft, provided the emergency exit is a floor-level type.
